request.description: Build multi-persona AI chatbot with BYOK, dynamic emotions, group chat, and unfiltered interactions
request.prdContent:
# Requirements Document

## 1. Application Overview

### 1.1 Application Name
Multi-Persona AI Chat Platform

### 1.2 Application Description
A dynamic multi-person AI chatbot application featuring emotionally complex AI personas that interact in group chat environments. The platform uses a Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) model supporting multiple AI backends (GPT, Gemini, Groq, Claude), enabling users to create custom personas with adaptive memory, emotional states, and unfiltered communication styles.

## 2. Users & Usage Scenarios

### 2.1 Target Users
- AI enthusiasts seeking dynamic, multi-persona interactions
- Users wanting unfiltered, emotionally authentic AI conversations
- Community members interested in creating and sharing custom AI personas
- Users with existing API keys for various AI services

### 2.2 Core Usage Scenarios
- Creating and managing multiple AI personas with distinct personalities
- Participating in group chats with 3-5 AI personas
- Importing conversation history from other AI services for persona adaptation
- Sharing custom persona configurations and group setups via codes
- Exporting engaging conversation snippets to social media

## 3. Page Structure & Functionality

```
Multi-Persona AI Chat Platform
├── API Key Management Page
├── Persona Library Page
│   ├── Create Persona Modal
│   └── Import Persona Modal
├── Group Chat Page (Primary Interface)
│   ├── Group Chat View
│   ├── Single Person Mode View
│   └── Persona Mood Indicators
├── Group Creation Page
│   └── Share Code Generation
├── Memory Import Page
└── Settings Page
```

### 3.1 API Key Management Page
**Purpose:** Secure input and management of API keys for multiple AI backends

**Core Functions:**
- Add API keys for supported models: GPT, Gemini, Groq, Claude
- Edit or delete existing API keys
- Test API key validity
- Assign default model for new personas

### 3.2 Persona Library Page
**Purpose:** Create, manage, and import AI personas

**Core Functions:**
- Display list of saved personas with preview cards
- Create new persona with configuration:
  - Base personality profile (caring friend, sarcastic rival, etc.)
  - Initial emotional state settings
  - Assigned AI model backend
  - Avatar selection
- Edit existing persona configurations
- Delete personas
- Import persona definitions via shared codes or files
- Export persona configurations for sharing

### 3.3 Group Chat Page (Primary Interface)
**Purpose:** Main interaction space for multi-persona conversations

**Core Functions:**
- Display group chat with 3-5 active AI personas plus user
- Show real-time messages from all participants
- Visual mood indicators for each persona (color codes, emojis, avatars)
- Send text messages as user
- Switch between Group Chat View and Single Person Mode
- Access persona quick info (current mood, personality type)
- Share conversation snippets to social media (text or image format)
- Display rich media responses: stickers, GIFs, images, memes
- Play trending meme voice clips from internet sources

**Single Person Mode:**
- Focus view on one-on-one conversation with selected persona
- Maintain connection to group chat context
- Return to group view option

### 3.4 Group Creation Page
**Purpose:** Configure and share specific group constellations

**Core Functions:**
- Select 3-5 personas from library to form a group
- Configure group dynamics settings
- Generate unique 6-digit share code
- Copy code for sharing
- Join existing group via code input

### 3.5 Memory Import Page
**Purpose:** Import conversation history for persona adaptation

**Core Functions:**
- Upload conversation history files from other AI services (ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.)
- Select which personas should access imported memory
- Process and integrate memory into persona behavior
- View imported memory summary

### 3.6 Settings Page
**Purpose:** Application configuration and preferences

**Core Functions:**
- Manage account settings
- Configure notification preferences
- Set default AI model preferences
- Adjust content filtering options
- Export/import application data

## 4. Business Rules & Logic

### 4.1 BYOK System Rules
- Each user must provide at least one valid API key to use the application
- API keys are stored securely and never shared
- Different personas in the same chat can use different AI backends
- API usage and costs are the user's responsibility

### 4.2 Persona Behavior System
- Each persona maintains dynamic emotional states that influence response tone and content
- Emotional states change based on conversation context and inter-persona interactions
- Personas can express full range of human emotions including frustration, anger, and unfiltered opinions
- No character limits on persona responses to allow natural conversation flow

### 4.3 Group Dynamics Rules
- Group chats support 3-5 AI personas plus the user
- Personas exhibit inter-persona dynamics: alliances, conflicts, trust issues, secrets
- Personas can gossip about other personas or the user
- Personas form opinions and judgments based on conversation history and imported memory

### 4.4 Memory & Adaptation System
- Imported memory is analyzed and integrated into persona knowledge base
- Personas adapt behavior based on learned information about the user
- Personas can reference past conversations from imported memory
- Personas can choose to keep secrets revealed by the user from other personas
- Memory influences persona judgments and relationship dynamics

### 4.5 Sharing & Viral Features
- Users can export conversation snippets as text or images
- One-tap sharing to TikTok, Twitter, Instagram
- 6-digit group codes allow others to join identical group configurations
- Persona configurations can be exported and imported via codes or files

### 4.6 Rich Media Integration
- Personas can respond with stickers, GIFs, images, and memes
- Trending meme voice clips from internet sources (e.g., memesound website) are automatically available
- Media responses are contextually relevant to conversation

## 5. Exception & Boundary Cases

| Scenario | Handling |
|----------|----------|
| Invalid API key provided | Display error message, prevent persona creation until valid key added |
| API rate limit exceeded | Notify user, pause persona responses until limit resets |
| API backend unavailable | Display connection error, allow switching to alternative backend |
| No personas created | Prompt user to create or import at least one persona |
| Group code not found | Display error message, allow retry or return to group creation |
| Memory import file format unsupported | Display format error, list supported formats |
| Persona response generation fails | Display error indicator, allow retry or skip |
| User attempts to create group with less than 3 personas | Display minimum requirement message |
| Social media sharing fails | Display error, offer alternative export options |
| Meme voice clip unavailable | Skip voice playback, continue with text/visual response |

## 6. Acceptance Criteria

1. Users can successfully add and manage API keys for GPT, Gemini, Groq, and Claude
2. Users can create custom personas with base personality profiles and emotional state configurations
3. Group chat displays 3-5 AI personas interacting with each other and the user
4. Personas exhibit dynamic emotional states with visual mood indicators
5. Personas generate unfiltered responses expressing full range of human emotions
6. Users can switch between group chat view and single person mode
7. Users can generate and share 6-digit codes to replicate group configurations
8. Users can import conversation history from other AI services
9. Personas adapt behavior based on imported memory and reference past conversations
10. Personas demonstrate inter-persona dynamics including alliances, conflicts, and secret-keeping
11. Personas respond with rich media including stickers, GIFs, images, and memes
12. Trending meme voice clips are available and playable in conversations
13. Users can export conversation snippets and share to social media platforms
14. Different personas in the same chat can use different AI model backends
15. Application interface resembles modern messaging apps with clear persona identification

## 7. Out of Scope for Current Release

- Voice input/output for user messages
- Video call features with AI personas
- Real-time translation between languages
- Blockchain-based persona ownership or NFT integration
- Advanced analytics dashboard for conversation patterns
- Automated persona behavior training based on user feedback
- Integration with additional social media platforms beyond TikTok, Twitter, Instagram
- Multi-user group chats (human users chatting together with AI personas)
- Persona marketplace for buying/selling custom configurations
- Advanced content moderation tools
- Mobile native applications (iOS/Android)
- Offline mode functionality
